recommendations.overview: Bill struggles to put together his shattered psyche.

recommendations.title: It's Such a Beautiful Day
recommendations.overview: Dark and troubling events force Bill to reckon with the meaning of his life.

recommendations.title: World of Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: A little girl is taken on a mind-bending tour of her distant future.

recommendations.title: Everything Will Be OK
recommendations.overview: A series of dark and troubling events forces Bill to reckon with the meaning of his life… or lack thereof.

recommendations.title: Feast
recommendations.overview: This Oscar-winning animated short film tells the story of one man's love life as seen through the eyes of his best friend and dog, Winston, and revealed bite by bite through the meals they share.

recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut
recommendations.overview: In this feature film based on the hit animated series, the third graders of South Park sneak into an R-rated film by ultra-vulgar Canadian television personalities Terrance and Phillip, and emerge with expanded vocabularies that leave their parents a

recommendations.title: Barbie as The Princess & the Pauper
recommendations.overview: In her first animated musical featuring seven original songs, Barbie comes to life in this modern re-telling of a classic tale of mistaken identity and the power of friendship. Based on the story by Mark Twain.

recommendations.title: The House
recommendations.overview: Across different eras, a poor family, an anxious developer and a fed-up landlady become tied to the same mysterious house in this animated dark comedy.
recommendations.director: Paloma Baeza, Emma De Swaef, Marc James Roels, Niki Lindroth von Bahr

recommendations.title: And Now for Something Completely Different
recommendations.overview: A collection of Monty Python's Flying Circus skits from the first two seasons of their British TV series.
